---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to detection, execution, or observability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Why It Matters

Explain the expected impact on trading quality, safety, or maintainability.

## Risks

What could break, or what tradeoff does this introduce?
